description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, rectangular layout with large floor-to-ceiling windows along the main facade. The exterior is a mix of dark and light materials, with a prominent use of glass and concrete, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property includes a spacious paved patio area, a swimming pool, and landscaped greenery with several trees and shrubs. The front entrance is accentuated by a walkway and a small garden, while the rear opens up to a pool and additional outdoor seating. The roof includes skylights, allowing natural light to flood the interior spaces. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, blending contemporary architecture with open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and symmetrical facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the flat roof with skylights, side garden, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large glass doors, patio, circular hot tub, and rectangular swimming pool.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the bungalow, the pool, and the dense tree line along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
